days.text: Mainly cloudy. Occasional Thundery showers. Force 4 to 5 southwesterly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
Unsettled. Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at first. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional Thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
